title: MembershipLimitException

posts.author: MiguelDiaz (Miguel Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

When I try to add subscribers to a board i get this response:
‘error_message’: ‘CustomExceptions::MembershipLimitException’, ‘error_code’: ‘RecordInvalidException’, ‘error_data’: {‘error_data’: ‘CustomExceptions::MembershipLimitException’}

Does anyone know why?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Following on from this question, is there a published list of error codes and what they mean?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MiguelDiaz,

That error is mentioned here and relates to exceeding the number of board subscribers. Do you know how many you have?

@dvdsmpsn this document contains a list of the more common errors.

Best,
Rachel
